articles.title: SBUX Price History for Starbucks Corp Stock
articles.summary: This article provides historical price data for Starbucks Corp (SBUX) stock, detailing its 52-week key points, including highs and lows, and Fibonacci levels. It also presents the frequency of new highs and lows over various periods, from 5-day to 20-year spans, indicating the percentage difference from the last recorded extreme. The content emphasizes Barchart's tools for accessing and downloading historical market data for stocks, options, indices, futures, and currencies.

articles.title: Starbucks (SBUX) exec sells 1,641 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
articles.summary: Brady Brewer, CEO International of Starbucks (SBUX), sold 1,641 shares of common stock at $90.00 per share on April 6, 2026. This transaction was carried out under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 3, 2025. Following the sale, Mr. Brewer directly holds 84,375.502 shares, indicating the sale represents a small portion of his total equity.

articles.title: Starbucks Corp. stock rises Wednesday, still underperforms market
articles.summary: Starbucks Corp. (SBUX) shares rose 2.10% on Wednesday to $97.21, marking its third consecutive day of gains. Despite this rise, Starbucks underperformed the broader market, as the S&P 500 Index increased by 2.51% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average gained 2.85%.
